conversations.title: Model access overflow bug
conversations.snippet: Long helper text leaked into settings UI.

conversations.title: Weekly hotfix stability
conversations.snippet: Restore Chinese prompt constraints and remove noisy counters.

highlights: The hotfix restored Chinese prompt behavior and reinforced the weekly quality gate against fragment leakage.
A quality-first latency policy was accepted to keep outputs readable and consistent during retries.
recurring_questions: How can we keep latency bounded while still allowing enough repair rounds for stable weekly quality?
unresolved_threads: The settings state machine still needs stronger guards to prevent test response text from leaking into UI fields.
suggested_focus: Add stress tests for model access state transitions and verify no prompt payload can render in settings widgets.

evidence.note: Captured the settings overflow symptom and reproduction path.
Recorded the weekly hotfix actions and validation checks.
